📢 Intense Technologies | Founder C.K. Shastri Retires, Named Chairman Emeritus

🔹 Intense Technologies announced the retirement of its Founder & Managing Director, Mr. C.K. Shastri, from active executive and Board responsibilities to focus on health and personal wellness.

🔹 Mr. Shastri founded and built Intense Technologies into a globally recognized enterprise software company, with its IP-led and AI-powered solutions serving leading enterprises across multiple geographies.

🔹 His leadership helped establish Intense as a trusted technology partner, with a strong focus on innovation, customer success, and proprietary intellectual property.

🔹 The Board acknowledged his decades-long contribution in creating a resilient organization, nurturing talent, and driving sustainable growth.

🔹 Commenting on the transition, Mr. Shastri stated that the culture of courage, innovation, and customer commitment built over the years will continue to guide the company's future journey.

🔹 In recognition of his extraordinary contribution, the Board has unanimously conferred upon him the honorary title of Chairman Emeritus, effective immediately.

🔹 As Chairman Emeritus, he will continue to provide strategic mentorship and institutional guidance to the leadership team while remaining free from day-to-day management responsibilities.

🔹 The company emphasized that a robust succession framework and experienced leadership team are in place to ensure seamless continuity of operations and long-term growth initiatives.

📌 Key Takeaway: While an era of active leadership comes to a close, Intense Technologies retains access to its founder's strategic wisdom through the Chairman Emeritus role, ensuring continuity as the company enters its next phase of growth.

Sumeet Industries Limited's ₹199.75 Cr Rights Issue to Fund 140,000 TPA Capacity Expansion, Debt Reduction and Solar Project

Sumeet Industries Limited has launched a ₹199.75 Cr Rights Issue, to support its next phase of growth, led by the integration of the recently acquired Polyester Chips facility from Nakoda Limited.

A key objective of the Rights Issue is the operationalisation of the acquired 140,000 TPA Polyester Chips Plant from Nakoda Limited, Surat. The Company plans to invest ₹49 Cr from the issue proceeds towards this project, which is expected to be recommissioned in Q1 FY27-28 and will strengthen backward integration, enhance manufacturing scale, and support downstream polyester operations.

Key Terms of the Rights Issue:
* Rights Issue Size: ₹199.75 Cr
* Shares Offered: 16.84 Cr Equity Shares
* Issue Price: ₹11.86 per Share
* Face Value: ₹2 per Share
* Entitlement Ratio: 8 Rights Shares for every 25 Shares Held
* Record Date: 12 June 2026
* Issue Opens: 22 June 2026
* Last Date for Renunciation: 15 July 2026
* Issue Closes: 20 July 2026

Strategic Allocation of Net Funds (₹194.90 Cr):
* ₹49.90 Cr marked for Nakoda asset integration and operationalisation, supporting the Company's downstream POY & FDY operations.
* ₹100 Cr towards working capital to support higher production volumes and raw material procurement.
* ₹23 Cr towards debt repayment to reduce finance costs and strengthen the balance sheet.
* ₹22 Cr for a 6.5 MW captive solar power plant to lower power costs and enhance energy security.

The Rights Issue marks a significant milestone in Sumeet Industries' growth journey, with the Nakoda acquisition expected to support approximately 30% growth in Total Income in FY27 with EBITDA margins of 5.0%–6.0%. Following successful integration, Total Income is expected to nearly double in FY28, with EBITDA margins improving to 5.5%–6.5%, reinforcing the Company's long-term growth and value creation potential

Alan Scott Enterprises Limited Launches AIRCUE - India's First Wall-Hanging Clock with Integrated AQI Monitor

Alan Scott Enterprises Limited is pleased to announce the launch of AIRCUE, India's first wall-hanging clock with a built-in Air Quality Index (AQI) monitor, following the successful development of its eco-friendly, specially treated cardboard body for the product.

Key Highlights:
* India's first wall-hanging clock with integrated AQI monitor
* Real-time tracking of PM2.5, PM10, NOx and VOC levels
* Temperature and humidity monitoring
* Specially treated eco-friendly cardboard body - durable, lightweight and environmentally responsible
* Wall-mount design suitable for homes, offices, schools and public spaces
* Launch Price: ₹11,500
* Advance order booking opens June 19, 2026

Expanding Environmental Tech Footprint:
This launch qualifies Alan Scott Enterprises Limited to directly address the growing demand for real-time air quality monitoring solutions - significantly strengthening its presence and credibility in India's consumer environmental technology segment.

This milestone reflects the Company's growing recognition as a purpose-led, innovation-driven enterprise committed to building future-ready products for Bharat.

Pharma Patent Expiry Wave (2026–2030)

Opportunity Size
- Drugs worth $142 Bn losing exclusivity
- Addressable market estimated at $30-40 Bn
- Indian pharma opportunity: $3-5 Bn
- One of the largest patent cliffs in recent years

Year-Wise Opportunity

- 2026: $20 Bn
- 2027: $17 Bn
- 2028: $54 Bn
- 2029: $42 Bn
- 2030: $9 Bn

Key Trend
- Large molecules: $89 Bn opportunity
- Small molecules: $53 Bn opportunity
- Biologics account for ~63% of total value
- Shift from generic-led to biosimilar-led opportunity

High-Potential Therapy Areas
- Oncology: 35%
- Immunology: 24%
- Diabetes: 10%
- Obesity: 9%
- Cardiometabolic: 8%

Why This Cycle Is Different
- Higher entry barriers
- Complex manufacturing requirements
- Greater regulatory scrutiny
- Larger capital commitments
- Fewer capable competitors

Indian Companies Best Positioned
- Biocon
- Dr. Reddy's Laboratories
- Sun Pharmaceutical
- Lupin
- Zydus Lifesciences
- Aurobindo Pharma
- Cipla

Key Success Factors
- First-to-market launches
- Strong biosimilar pipeline
- Regulatory approvals
- Manufacturing scale
- Global commercialization capabilities

Key Risks
- Patent litigation
- Secondary patents
- Delayed approvals
- Pricing pressure
- Innovator company strategies

Key Takeaway
- The upcoming patent cliff is heavily skewed toward biologics and biosimilars
- Companies with strong R&D, regulatory expertise and biologics manufacturing capabilities are likely to be the biggest beneficiaries
- Biocon, Dr. Reddy's, Sun Pharma and Zydus appear among the strongest positioned Indian players for this multi-year opportunity

Emerald Finance Limited has partnered with Bizvisory Hr Global Solutions Private Limited, Delhi to launch our new Early-Wage-Access (EWA) program.

This strategic initiative is designed to provide immediate financial flexibility  towards workforce through compensation access. Employees can draw down on their earned salary in real-time to cover day-to-day needs, with automated settlement during the regular monthly payroll.

PROSTARM INFO SYSTEMS : APPROVES MANUFACTURING REALIGNMENT TO BOOST EFFICIENCY 🏭⚙️

• 🔄 Prostarm Info Systems has approved a strategic realignment and consolidation of manufacturing operations to enhance efficiency, optimize infrastructure utilization and strengthen focus on core business segments. 

• 📍 The company will relocate its Servo Stabilizer and Isolation Transformers business from the Pisoli Unit, Pune to the Mahape Unit, Navi Mumbai. 

• 🔋 Its Lithium Battery manufacturing operations will be shifted from the Mahape Unit, Navi Mumbai to the Bakrol Unit, Ahmedabad. 

• 📊 The Servo Stabilizer and Isolation Transformers operations at Pisoli contributed ₹5.17 crore, accounting for 1.34% of FY26 consolidated turnover of ₹385.77 crore. 

• ⚡ The Lithium Battery business at Mahape contributed ₹25.25 crore, representing 6.55% of FY26 consolidated turnover. 

• 📅 The transition and relocation of these operations are expected to be completed on or before August 2026. 

• 🚫 The company clarified that the move is an internal reorganization and does not involve any sale, transfer or disposal of units or divisions. 

🟢 Impact: Positive (The strategic consolidation is expected to improve operational efficiency, optimize resources and achieve better economies of scale, particularly in the growing lithium battery segment.)

• 👨‍💼 Bluegod Entertainment Ltd has appointed Mr. Raman Raheja (DIN: 01426148) as an Additional Non-Executive Non-Independent Director for a term of five consecutive years, effective June 16, 2026, subject to shareholder approval. 

• 🏏 Mr. Raheja is the Co-Founder of Legends League Cricket (LLC) and Founder of Sports Flashes, bringing deep expertise in sports and media. 

• 📺 He has over 30 years of experience in sports, media, entertainment and strategic business development.

• 🇨🇳 The investigation covered imports of Thermoplastic Polyurethane (TPU)-based surface/Paint Protection Film from the People’s Republic of China. 

• ⏳ The final notification from the Central Government is still awaited, after which the duty may become effective. 

🟢 Impact: Positive (Anti-dumping duty can curb low-cost Chinese imports, improve pricing power and support market share gains for Garware Hi-Tech Films.)

• 🤝 The company clarified that its regulated products largely operate through co-branded program structures, where any breakage income belongs to partner brands, not Pine Labs. 

• 💰 Pine Labs stated that breakage income has never been a material part of its revenue or profit pool. 

• 📊 The company emphasized that such income has never been recognized in its P&L, and hence does not contribute meaningfully to earnings. 

• 🏦 Even if the RBI issues fresh regulations regarding breakage income, Pine Labs does not foresee any meaningful impact on its business, revenue or profitability. 

• ⏳ The co-branded operating model has been in place for over a decade across Pine Labs’ regulated programs in India. 

🟢 Impact: Positive (The clarification removes concerns over potential regulatory risks and reassures investors that any RBI action is unlikely to materially impact Pine Labs’ financials.)

TT LIMITED : 8 LAKH WARRANTS LAPSE; ₹2.44 CR FORFEITED 📉💰

• ⚠️ TT Limited announced the lapse of 8,00,000 convertible warrants issued on a preferential basis after holders failed to exercise them within the stipulated period. 

• 💸 The company has forfeited ₹2.44 crore, representing the 25% upfront subscription amount paid at the time of allotment. 

• 📅 The warrants, allotted on December 16, 2024, had an 18-month tenure ending on June 15, 2026. 

• 🚫 Warrant holders failed to pay the remaining 75% consideration, leading to the lapse of all warrants. 

• 👥 VASM Consultants Pvt Ltd (2 lakh warrants) and Subhash Phootarmal Rathod (6 lakh warrants) were the affected warrant holders. 

• 📊 The company clarified that there will be no change in paid-up share capital, while the forfeited amount will be retained in accordance with accounting standards. 

🟢 Impact: Slightly Positive (The forfeiture adds ₹2.44 crore to the company without equity dilution, though the lapse indicates investors chose not to infuse additional capital.)

🟢 Impact: Positive (The plant boosts Grasim’s specialty chemicals portfolio, enhances import substitution and opens up a large growth opportunity in the CPVC segment.)

Adani Enterprises Ltd. & Jabil Inc. are targeting a strategic alliance to establish a world-class, vertically integrated AI & data center infrastructure manufacturing platform in India 🇮🇳.

This collaboration aims to leverage Jabil's extensive engineering & manufacturing expertise with Adani Group's vast infrastructure, green energy, & logistics network, along with its growing domestic data center operations. The partnership is set to address the surging demand for AI-ready data center hardware globally.

Key Pillars of the Manufacturing Platform:

- 𝗚𝗶𝗴𝗮-𝗦𝗰𝗮𝗹𝗲 𝗔𝗜 𝗥𝗮𝗰𝗸 𝗔𝗿𝗰𝗵𝗶𝘁𝗲𝗰𝘁𝘂𝗿𝗲: Plans to deploy multi-GW capacity for high-density AI Rack manufacturing in India, catering to global hyperscalers, co-location facilities, & enterprise data centers. This includes advanced manufacturing of next-gen liquid-cooled AI racks, servers, storage, & networking systems.
- 360-𝗗𝗲𝗴𝗿𝗲𝗲 𝗔𝗜 𝗜𝗻𝗳𝗿𝗮𝘀𝘁𝗿𝘂𝗰𝘁𝘂𝗿𝗲 𝗘𝗰𝗼𝘀𝘆𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗺: Encompasses manufacturing of white space & grey space devices such as Power Distribution Units (PDUs), Coolant Distribution Units (CDUs), Transformers, Switchgears, Bus Bars, & advanced thermal management systems. The goal is to offer an end-to-end, design-to-deployment hardware ecosystem.
- 𝗠𝗮𝗿𝗸𝗲𝘁 𝗦𝗰𝗮𝗹𝗲 & 𝗧𝗿𝗮𝗻𝘀𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝘁𝗼 𝗙𝗶𝗻𝗮𝗹 𝗗𝗼𝗰𝘂𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻: This initiative targets a global market opportunity exceeding USD 3 trillion over the next 7 years, driven by AI compute investments. Definitive operational frameworks & formal documentation are currently being developed.

𝗦𝘁𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗴𝗶𝗰 𝗥𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗮𝗹𝗲:

- India's data center market is projected to reach 5-8 GW by 2030, driven by AI demand & data localization. 📈
- Global hyperscalers are investing over USD 50 billion in India's digital infrastructure.
- The alliance supports India's 'Make in India' initiative, aiming to transform the nation into a dominant global manufacturer & exporter of AI hardware.
- Aligns with Adani Group's commitment to develop 5 GW of green-energy-powered data centers by 2035.
- Jabil, with USD 29.8 billion revenue in FY25, brings significant expertise in power management & thermal solutions.

Mr. Gautam Adani, Chairman, Adani Group, stated, "Our alliance with Jabil represents a decisive step in building India's complete AI infrastructure stack — from green power generation to world-class hardware manufacturing. Together, we will ensure India is not merely a consumer in the AI age, but a creator, builder, and exporter of intelligence." 🚀

Mr. Mike Dastoor, CEO, Jabil, added, "By combining Jabil's more than sixty years of engineering expertise & advanced manufacturing capabilities with Adani's formidable infrastructure & energy platform, we can expect to execute down to the rack level for hyperscalers & enterprises here in India & across the globe."

ASHOK LEYLAND & SWITCH MOBILITY BECOME FIRST OEMs UNDER DELHI-NCR VEHICLE SCRAPPAGE SCHEME 🚛⚡

• 🤝 The Ministry of Road Transport & Highways (MoRTH) has signed its first MoU under the Delhi-NCR vehicle replacement scheme with Ashok Leyland and its EV arm Switch Mobility

• 🏷️ The companies will offer an 8% discount on ex-showroom prices of eligible trucks and buses under the scheme

• ⚡ For electric vehicles, the discount will be capped at the equivalent ICE vehicle discount in the same GVW category

• 💰 In addition to OEM discounts, the Central Government will provide a 5% interest subvention and monthly fuel vouchers for 5 years

• 🏛️ Participating State Governments will offer up to 100% motor vehicle tax concession for 10 years and waiver of registration fees

• 🌱 The scheme targets replacement of BS-IV and older vehicles in Delhi-NCR with BS-VI or electric vehicles, aiming to reduce pollution and modernize fleets

• 🚚 More automobile OEMs are expected to join the scheme in the coming days

🟢 Impact: Positive (Ashok Leyland gains first-mover advantage in fleet replacement, while the scheme could boost truck and bus demand, including electric vehicles.)

• 🤝 The agreements were originally with Henkel India Ltd, which has since merged with Jyothy Labs

• 🔄 Jyothy Labs stated that it will keep exchanges informed of any further material developments
